notes: Validation-only fixture for HAR-693 metafieldDefinitionCreate guardrails. Length, invalid-character, unknown-type, and name-length payloads mirror live 2025-01 conformance probes. Reserved namespace cases encode the ticket's protected-namespace contract because the current conformance app is allowed to create these definitions in the disposable shop.
